title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: MemoryChunk metadata_pointer_table OOB write
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
At `src/heap/memory-chunk.cc:55`, the `metadata_index_` value is used to index `metadata_pointer_table` without being sanitized (other locations use `MemoryChunkConstants::kMetadataPointerTableSizeMask` to mask the index). A worker thread running in the background may muta
